phrasal_verbs.meaning: produce sth such as heat or a smell
think of (an idea, a plan, etc)
find the solution to a problem, etc

attempt: make an attempt (at sth/doing / to do)
consider: it strange, etc (for sb to do)

G.title: Original key word transformation practice
G.instructions: Complete the second sentence so that it keeps the same meaning as the first.

questions.sentence:
Mia began the class project before the lesson on Science and technology. **IN**
The class project ...... before the lesson on Science and technology.

Leo began the study group before the lesson on Science and technology. **MANAGED**
The study group ...... before the lesson on Science and technology.

Sara began the exam workshop before the lesson on Science and technology. **AS**
The exam workshop ...... before the lesson on Science and technology.

Tom began the online lesson before the lesson on Science and technology. **PLAN**
The online lesson ...... before the lesson on Science and technology.

Nina began the school club before the lesson on Science and technology. **CONSIDERING**
The school club ...... before the lesson on Science and technology.

Oscar began the revision session before the lesson on Science and technology. **US**
The revision session ...... before the lesson on Science and technology.
questions.answer: is impossible for us/is not possible for us
